step_by_step_thinking:
I agree that zoophobia is often the most prevalent phobia among children due to their inherent fascination and occasional fear triggered by various animals they encounter regularly. Additionally, media portrayals of dangerous animals can also contribute significantly to this type of phobia in young individuals.

Answer: A
